title: Phenomenon 4
wikitext:
{{VoidedTheme|mono}}{{Background|file=the void.png}}{{DISPLAYTITLE:The Indomitable Spirit / Phenomenon 4}} __NOTOC__ {{Phenomenon Class|frequency=1|effectiveness=5|danger=1}} {{CSS|content= .fandom-community-header__image img { opacity:0; } }} {{CSS|content= .fandom-community-header__image img { opacity:0; } .fandom-community-header__image::before { content:''; background:url(https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/backrooms/images/6/67/Oroborous2.png/revision/latest?cb=20250822133049) no-repeat; width:100px; height:100px; background-size:100px; position: absolute; } .wds-global-navigation *, .fandom-sticky-header *, .fandom-community-header * { text-shadow: none !important; filter: none !important; /* kills drop-shadow() */ box-shadow: none !important; } /* Icons & logos specifically (SVGs and images) */ .wds-icon, .wds-icon svg, .wds-global-navigation__logo img, .fandom-community-header__brand .wiki-logo, .fandom-community-header__image img, .fandom-community-header__avatar img { filter: none !important; text-shadow: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; } /* Hover states sometimes add the glow—turn those off too */ .wds-global-navigation a:hover, .wds-global-navigation button:hover { filter: none !important; text-shadow: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; } }} == CAUSES == Phenomenon 4, also known as The Indomitable Spirit, manifests in many levels across The Backrooms. It occurs when a lifeform, mostly humans, perishes while displaying immense bravery or courage. As such, this process has been nicknamed "The Sacrifice." This phenomenon will come into effect when the wanderer comes near an area where "The Sacrifice" has occurred. Strangely, the corpses that were involved in "The Sacrifice" were unable to be found again, only leaving behind a mess of symbols. Any disruption during the formation of these symbols or alteration of the site of Phenomenon 4's occurrence will result in it becoming nullified. Many M.E.G. experts have been consulted; however, the symbols have not been deciphered as of yet.[[File:Symbols of idk.png|thumb|Symbols from Phenomenon 4 sketched down by an anonymous wanderer.]] == EFFECTS == This phenomenon will give the wanderer a rush of adrenaline and slightly enhanced strength, willpower, and agility. The effects commonly wear off after the wanderer has encountered and escaped from the life-threatening situation. Phenomenon 4 enables wanderers to surpass the critical point at which bodily failure would usually occur. For example, if they were bleeding uncontrollably, the phenomenon would enable them to keep moving in spite of the excessive blood loss. This phenomenon, despite common belief, does not increase the wanderer's natural lifespan. In summary, Phenomenon 4 extends the capabilities of the human body temporarily, much like the concept of adrenaline.

During this period of time, the wanderer's immune system is almost impervious to all diseases, such as the [[Hydrolitis Plague|Hydrolitis Plague]], and can recover with ease. Unfortunately, diseases that are more anomalous in nature would only be halted temporarily. For example, the progression of the Sanguine Festivus Virus past Stage Three would be postponed by 3 to 4 hours before transforming the wanderer into a [[Sanguine Festivus|Partygoer]]. After the effects wear off, the original symbols that kickstarted the effects would begin to fade away in a day. Even if the heart of the affected organism has stopped, its consciousness would be extended. It is still possible to jumpstart the heart in this short period of time to allow the organism's survival. Weaker entities such as [[Entity 8|Hounds]] and [[Entity 4|Deathmoths]] have been found to be repelled by this phenomenon. These entities will not go near a wanderer as long as the phenomenon is active within them. They will also avoid living near areas where "The Sacrifice" has taken place more than 4 times. However, stronger, more malevolent, and more chaotic entities such as [[Entity 96|Seers]], [[Entity 10|Skin-stealers]], and [[Phenomenon 35|Wretches]] are attracted to the wanderer or any locations where "The Sacrifice" has taken place. These entities will aim to wipe out the wanderer at all costs. Additionally, these entities are able to sense and detect where Phenomenon 4 has taken place throughout the level. == HISTORY== Phenomenon 4 has been officially documented since 1990. However, Phenomenon 4's occurrence was dated back to around 2575 to 2465 BCE. Explorers reported discovering hieroglyphics from [[Level 866|Level 866]] depicting a wanderer defeating The Pharaoh in close quarters combat after Phenomenon 4 came into effect. Snippets of these hieroglyphics have been pinned down below. Only one subsequent photograph was deemed fit to be released to the public as reseach on Phenomenon 4 is still underway [[File:Battlelele.png|thumb|215x215px|A recovered photograph of one of the hieroglyphs found. ]] Phenomenon 4 was officially documented after multiple wanderers claimed to experience a powerful sensation in the face of death. Due to the similarities of Phenomenon 4 to adrenaline, it was only until 1990 that the M.E.G. took this matter into concern and sent researchers to explore the nature of Phenomenon 4. Originally, it was documented based on rumor and hearsay. It was not until around 2001 when concrete evidence of Phenomenon 4's existence was provided. A few videotapes of wanderers taking down Partygoers after a white flash of light were submitted to multiple research groups. In addition, the third and final phase of the [[Hydrolitis Plague|Hydrolitis Plague's]] progression was confirmed to be completely reversed by Phenomenon 4's intervention. == THEORIES == It is unknown how the phenomenon manifests. As such, many wanderers and M.E.G. experts have come up with a few theories to explain the occurrence of this phenomenon. (Entities with high levels of intelligence, such as [[Caius Taggert|Caius Taggert]], at a price, have been consulted as well.) === The Lingering Spirit Theory === As the above theory is heavily philosophical, many wanderers have attempted to concoct their own theories as to why Phenomenon 4 occurs. Very few of these theories have disputed the one above. Many wanderers have claimed that they could hear faint voices in their heads after Phenomenon 4 took place. This has led most people to believe that the souls used for "The Sacrifice" would linger in the Backrooms to follow the chosen wanderer until it fades. Additionally, it is believed that the symbols are of another language and hold the key to escape from [[Backrooms Wiki|this prison]]. These claims have not been supported with concrete evidence. ----

---- A rare instance of a wanderer being affected by this phenomenon has been pinned down below:
(All information was gathered from an Interview with [[Caius Taggert|Caius Taggert]] in exchange for partial access of ███████)

— Starting Interview with [[Caius Taggert|Caius Taggert]] on Phenomenon 4. —

"What do you want from me?"

"What we promised: I give you access, and you give me information. Simple."

"Fine. This won't take long, I suppose."

"It better not."
"What was that?"

"Oh, uh..." *gulp*

"C-carry on, please."
...


"Many, many years ago, back when I had not yet been crowned as '[[Caius Taggert|The Party Host]]', back when I still wandered those mono-yellow halls to satisfy [[Sanguine Festivus|my endless hunger]]..."
"Back when I had not yet obtained absolute power... Somethin' happened — somethin' that altered the course of my life forever."
